items.title: Churches (Scotland) Act 1905
items.description: An Act to provide for the Settlement of certain Questions between the Free Church and the United Free Church in Scotland, and to make certain amendments of the law with respect to the Church of Scotland.

items.title: Provisional Order (Marriages) Act 1905
items.description: An Act to enable Provisional Orders to be made for removing any invalidity or doubt attaching to Marriages by reason of some informality.
